text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hey... I found this phone on the floor.<n>Could you
return it for me, please?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No calls have come through yet, so<n>whoever
dropped it must still be close<n>by...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And, you know... things like this contain,<n>well...
memories... and other important<n>stuff.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So don't keep them waiting... I'm sure<n>they'd
rather have you return their lost<n>item than me.
